name: ERP Low Stock Alert
description: Sends an email alert when any product quantity drops below reorder threshold

triggers.name: low-stock-check
triggers.configJson: {"connectionString": "Host=postgres-erp-test;Database=erp_inventory;Username=postgres;Password=postgres", "query": "SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM products WHERE quantity < reorder_threshold"}

taskConfig:
{"interpreter": "/app/venv/bin/python3", "scriptPath": "/app/examples/send-email-resend/send_email.py", "packages": ["resend"], "env": {"RESEND_API_KEY": "re_2sywtsT7_9RUEfGsYSQR78XL5p3WUbeU4", "EMAIL_FROM": "FlowForge ", "EMAIL_TO": "mohripan16@gmail.com", "EMAIL_SUBJECT": "\u26a0\ufe0f Low Stock Alert \u2014 ERP Inventory", "EMAIL_HTML": "

⚠️ Low Stock Alert

One or more products in your ERP inventory have dropped below their reorder threshold of 5 units.

Please reorder immediately.

"}}
